description: Replayable Helios collector fixture for international defense exhibitors used to seed cases and local-first graph ingest.

provenance.collection_method: manual analyst curation into replayable fixture
provenance.notes: Use for local-first collector development before live-source automation. Do not treat as authoritative sanctions or registry evidence.
